violations.text: 2 door reach-in #2 was observed holding an ambient temperature of 44 DF. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Owner was contacted/informed at the time of inspection. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

Various food located in the 2 door reach-in #1 was observed held between 48-43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. 2 door reach-in was observed holding an ambient of 45 DF. All food in unit was evaluated. All food 45 DF or higher was voluntarily disposed of and the rest of food was moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Rice was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

-The 2 door reach-in #1 was observed holding an ambient of 45 DF and in poor repair. -The 3-bay sink faucet was observed in poor repair. Establishment must service faucet Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door reach-in #1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Tartar sauce was observed held at 68 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
Inspector observed rice in hot hold unit being stored in single service shopping bags. PIC removed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
Ambient of refrigerator #1 was 68 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service prior to inspection. TCS foods disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
Ledge above ware washing area was not in good repair, observed splintering wood. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
The following door gaskets were observed in poor repair. 1. Prep unit 2. Refrigerator #2 New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following: 1. Flat top grill (knobs) have an accumulation of grease and food residue 2. Fan (Refrigerator #2) has an accumulation of dust and debris. 3. Air conditioner (above ware washing area) has an accumulation of dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
The floors behind cookline have an accumulation of grease and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
